page.title: Documents
page.description: Manage your knowledge base documents for AI agents.

search.placeholder: Search documents by keyword or natural language...

errorBanner.failedToProcess: {count} document failed to process | {count} documents failed to process
errorBanner.needsAttention: These documents encountered errors during import and may need attention.

empty.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
empty.getStarted: Get started by uploading your first document.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Document
deleteDialog.confirmSingle: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will also delete all associated embeddings.
deleteDialog.confirmBulk: Are you sure you want to delete {count} document? This action cannot be undone and will also delete all associated embeddings. | Are you sure you want to delete {count} documents? This action cannot be undone and will also delete all associated embeddings.

uploadDialog.title: Upload Document
uploadDialog.description: Upload a document to create embeddings for semantic search

toast.updateStarted: Update started for {name}. Check the job queue for progress.
toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete document. Please try again.
toast.bulkDeletePartial: Successfully deleted {success} document(s). Failed to delete {failed} document(s).
toast.bulkDeleteFailed: Failed to delete documents. Please try again.
toast.retryPartial: Retry started for {success} document(s). Failed to retry {failed} document(s).
toast.retryAllFailed: Failed to retry documents. Please try again.

detail.noContent: No content available for this document.

page.title: Import Document
page.description: Add new documents to your knowledge base from various sources.
page.seoDescription: Import documents to your knowledge base

dropOverlay.title: Drop files to upload
dropOverlay.description: Release to start importing your documents

source.title: Select Import Source
source.description: Choose how you want to import documents into your knowledge base.
source.importFromWebsiteDesc: Crawl and import documentation from any website

fileSelection.title: Select Files
fileSelection.description: Choose one or more documents to upload. Supported formats: PDF, TXT, MD, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, HTML, JSON, CSV
fileSelection.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
fileSelection.fileSizeLimit: Support for multiple files up to 10MB each

webUrl.title: Enter Website URL
webUrl.description: Provide the URL of the documentation website you want to import.
webUrl.label: Documentation URL
webUrl.hint: We'll crawl this website and import all documentation pages automatically.

howItWorksList.sitemap: We'll check for a sitemap.xml file first
howItWorksList.crawl: If no sitemap is found, we'll crawl all internal links
howItWorksList.sameDomain: Only pages from the same domain will be imported
howItWorksList.markdown: Content will be converted to clean markdown format

discovery.descriptionDiscovering: Scanning website for documentation pages. This may take a few minutes...
discovery.descriptionSelect: Found {count} pages. Select which ones to import to your knowledge base.

pleaseWaitList.stayOnPage: Stay on this page while we discover all documentation
pleaseWaitList.checkingSitemaps: We're checking for sitemaps and crawling internal links

discovery.noPagesFoundDescription: We couldn't discover any pages from this website. The site may be blocking automated requests or requires JavaScript to render its content. You can try a different URL or import documents manually instead.
discovery.tipDescription: Review the pages carefully. You can deselect any pages that aren't relevant documentation.

metadata.title: Document Metadata
metadata.description: Configure how these {count} pages will be stored in your knowledge base.
metadata.convertedToMarkdown: Each page will be converted to markdown format
metadata.chunkedAndVectorized: Content will be chunked and vectorized for AI search

details.title: Document Details
details.description: Provide metadata for your documents to help with organization and searchability.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the document's contents
details.makeAvailable: Make this document immediately available to AI agents

processing.websiteBeingCrawled: Your website is being crawled and processed.
processing.documentsBeingProcessed: Your documents are being processed and added to the knowledge base.
processing.processingMessage: This may take a while depending on the number of pages. Feel free to leave this page now - you'll see all documents on your Documents page once they're fully processed. Documents will appear with a "Processing" status initially, then change to "Published" when ready.

toast.uploadSuccess: Successfully uploaded {count} document | Successfully uploaded {count} documents
toast.uploadPartial: {success} document uploaded successfully, {failed} failed | {success} documents uploaded successfully, {failed} failed
toast.uploadFailed: Failed to upload {count} document | Failed to upload {count} documents
toast.cancelSuccessMessage: The import job has been cancelled successfully.
